home.title: Bazar Retrô
home.subtitle: Your Nostalgic Treasure Trove
home.heroTagline: Trading cards, retro games, used books, vinyl records, and craft beverages — all under one roof.
home.aboutText: Born from a passion for nostalgia and pop culture, Bazar Retrô is a gathering place for collectors, gamers, readers, and anyone who appreciates the classics.
home.featuredCardsDesc: Pokémon TCG, Magic: The Gathering, and Yu-Gi-Oh! — boosters, singles, and sealed products.
home.featuredRetroDesc: Classic titles for Nintendo 64, Atari, and PlayStation — cartridges, discs, and accessories.
home.featuredBeveragesDesc: Artisanal coffee, specialty teas, fresh juices, and craft sodas to enjoy while you browse.

menu.title: Catalog
menu.subtitle: Explore our collection
menu.pokemonDesc: Booster packs, elite trainer boxes, and singles from all Pokémon TCG sets.
menu.magicDesc: Commander decks, draft boosters, and singles for all Magic formats.
menu.yugiohDesc: Structure decks, booster boxes, and single cards for duelists.
menu.n64Desc: Classic N64 cartridges, controllers, and accessories from the golden era.
menu.atariDesc: Original Atari cartridges and retro gaming hardware for true enthusiasts.
menu.playstationDesc: PS1 games, memory cards, and controllers — relive the classics.
menu.fictionDesc: Novels, short stories, and literary classics from our curated used book collection.
menu.comicsDesc: Graphic novels, manga volumes, and comic book collections in great condition.
menu.nonFictionDesc: History, science, philosophy, and more from our secondhand book selection.
menu.cdsDesc: Music CDs across all genres — rock, jazz, MPB, classical, and more.
menu.vinylsDesc: Curated vinyl records, LP collections, and rare pressings for audiophiles.
menu.hotBeveragesDesc: Artisanal coffee, specialty teas, and rich hot chocolate.
menu.coldBeveragesDesc: Fresh juices, craft sodas, iced teas, and smoothies.

about.title: About Bazar Retrô
about.storyText: Bazar Retrô was born from the idea that the best things in life deserve a second chance. We curate trading cards, retro games, used books, vinyl records, and CDs — alongside craft beverages to make your visit a true experience.
about.missionText: We believe that nostalgia is a treasure. Our mission is to connect people with the things they love — whether it's a childhood game, a rare card, a forgotten book, or the perfect vinyl — all in a welcoming space with great drinks.
about.valueCraft: Curation — Every item is hand-picked for quality and authenticity.
about.valueCreativity: Community — We host game nights, trading events, and listening sessions.
about.valueCommunity: Nostalgia — We celebrate the classics and the stories they carry.
